name: Waxen Spike
desc_clean: Melting Remnant X The alliance of the Rings of Hell also created an alliance between the Reformed and the Wickless Remains, bringing together the separate groups under Flicker.

Reform.definition_short: Zwraca jednostkę z exhaust do ręki z powiększonymi statami.

mechanic_summary: Waxen Spike to Spell klanu Melting Remnant. Melting Remnant X The alliance of the Rings of Hell also created an alliance between the Reformed and the Wickless Remains, bringing together the separate groups under Flicker. Keywords: Reform.
wiki_desc: Melting Remnant X The alliance of the Rings of Hell also created an alliance between the Reformed and the Wickless Remains, bringing together the separate groups under Flicker. To seal their pact, they created a Railspike from their collective wax and drove it into our Rail.
